payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: White painted square picture frame with a narrow inner white mat and clear glass displaying a small beach/umbrella print; frame is fully visible in the crop with slight surface smudging and mild glass glare, photographed close to the camera at approximately 0.8 m.
